acquisition method: label-free Data Independent Acquisition Mass Spectrometry (DIA-MS)
enrichment method: wheat germ agglutinin beads membrane protein enrichment.
fractionation method: high pH reversed phase chromatography with a Dionex Ultimate 3000 HPLC.
fragmentation method: acquired on a Q-Exactive HF mass spectrometer with HCD fragmentation.
instrument: acquired on a Q-Exactive HF mass spectrometer.
ionization type: equipped with a nano-electrospray ion source.
labeling: using a label-free Data Independent Acquisition Mass Spectrometry (DIA-MS) approach.
